Virtual desktops	Only render current desktop DOM; inactive desktops kept as lightweight JS objects.

column1: Snap previews	Render a single preview element; move using transform: translate() instead of absolute top/left recalculation.

column2: low-cost transitions; avoid box-shadow on multiple elements simultaneously.

column1: Clock	Update once per minute instead of per second unless fine granularity is needed.
Wallpaper	Preload and cache images; apply transitions via opacity only when changed.

Modern UI effects destroy low-end CPUs.
Sharp edges render 10× faster and match the Academy aesthetic.

Do NOT let CSS recalc children automatically.
